answers: Stress management involves techniques to cope with pressure. Try deep breathing, exercise, time management, talking to someone, and setting realistic expectations for yourself.
Stress komabe: regular exercise koro, enough ghum pao, healthy khabar khao, breaks nao, ar overcommit koro na. Sometimes just saying 'no' reduces a lot of stress.
Stress symptoms include headaches, muscle tension, fatigue, irritability, difficulty sleeping, and trouble concentrating. Chronic stress can affect your immune system and overall health.
To relax when stressed, try progressive muscle relaxation, listen to calming music, take a warm shower, go for a nature walk, or practice 5 minutes of deep breathing. Find what works best for you.
